name: add
subcommands.description: Add file contents to the index

name: status
subcommands.description: Show the working tree status

name: commit
subcommands.description: Record changes to the repository

name: --message
-m
options.description: Use the given message as the commit message

name: --all
-a
options.description: Stage all modified/deleted files before committing

name: checkout
co
subcommands.description: Switch branches or restore files

name: -b
options.description: Create a new branch and switch to it

name: switch
subcommands.description: Switch to another branch

name: branch
subcommands.description: List or manage branches

name: merge
subcommands.description: Join two or more development histories together

name: rebase
subcommands.description: Reapply commits on top of another base tip

name: pull
subcommands.description: Fetch from and integrate with another repository or branch

name: push
subcommands.description: Update remote refs along with associated objects

name: --force-with-lease
options.description: Force push, refusing if the remote ref is not what's expected

name: --set-upstream
-u
options.description: Set the upstream for the pushed branch

name: fetch
subcommands.description: Download objects and refs from another repository

name: clone
subcommands.description: Clone a repository into a new directory

name: log
subcommands.description: Show commit logs

name: diff
subcommands.description: Show changes between commits, commit and working tree, etc

name: stash
subcommands.description: Stash the changes in a dirty working directory away

name: reset
subcommands.description: Reset current HEAD to the specified state

name: restore
subcommands.description: Restore working tree files

name: remote
subcommands.description: Manage the set of tracked repositories

name: cherry-pick
subcommands.description: Apply the changes introduced by some existing commits

name: tag
subcommands.description: Create, list, delete or verify a tag object

name: init
subcommands.description: Create an empty Git repository or reinitialize an existing one

name: show
subcommands.description: Show various types of objects
